channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

  2. Sources: Cowboys agree to three-year deal with RB Williams  ESPN
  3. Potential Texans FA target RB Javonte Williams re-signs with Cowboys  Yahoo Sports
  4. Cowboys re-sign running back Javonte Williams to a new three-year, $24 million contract before free agency  CBS Sports
  5. Cowboys, RB Javonte Williams agree to terms on three-year, $24 million contract extension  NFL.com
item.source: Dallas Cowboys | Official Site of the Dallas Cowboys

item.title: Michigan, Duke, Arizona top NCAA's early bracket seeding preview - ESPN
item.description:
1. Michigan, Duke, Arizona top NCAA's early bracket seeding preview  ESPN
  2. Michigan the No. 1 overall seed in NCAA March Madness Bracket Preview  Yahoo Sports

  4. NCAA tournament top 16 seeds have rough day just hours after reveal  USA Today
  5. Michigan, MSU hoops listed in early reveal of NCAA men’s top 16 seeds  The Detroit News

item.title: Bill Mazeroski, 89, Whose 9th-Inning Blast Made Pirates Champs, Is Dead - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Bill Mazeroski, 89, Whose 9th-Inning Blast Made Pirates Champs, Is Dead  The New York Times
  2. Mazeroski, known for 1960 World Series walk-off homer, dies at 89  ESPN
  3. Remembering Maz: Pirates legend, Pittsburgh hero — a photo gallery  TribLIVE.com
  4. 'What an icon': Pirates mourn the loss of the legendary Mazeroski  MLB.com
  5. A-Maz-ing Career  Baseball Hall of Fame

item.title: Former UK Prime Minister Boris Johnson calls on allies to send noncombat troops to Ukraine - PBS
item.description:
1. Former UK Prime Minister Boris Johnson calls on allies to send noncombat troops to Ukraine  PBS
  2. UK should send non-combat troops to Ukraine now, former PM Johnson tells BBC  BBC
  3. Ex-UK Prime Minister Johnson calls on allies to send noncombat troops to Ukraine ahead of ceasefire  AP News
  4. Ukraine war latest: UK will ‘make 2026 the year war ends’ after vow to deploy troops  The Independent
  5. Healey: I want to send British troops to Ukraine  The Telegraph

item.title: 'Given a gun and sent to die': Kenyans lured to fight for Russia in Ukraine - NPR
item.description:
1. 'Given a gun and sent to die': Kenyans lured to fight for Russia in Ukraine  NPR
  2. Over 1,000 Kenyans enlisted to fight in Russia-Ukraine war, report says  BBC
  3. Kenyan families demand return of loved ones recruited into Russian army  Al Jazeera
  4. As war losses near 2 million, Russia accused of trafficking foreign recruits from Africa, Asia  Fox News
  5. A thousand Kenyans 'recruited' for Russia's war — new report  DW.com
